general.name: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
general.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
general.description_zh: 单个 CLAUDE.md 文件，用于改进 Claude Code 的表现，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码常见问题的观察。

general.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
general.description: The agent that grows with you
general.description_zh: 与你共同成长的智能体

general.name: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
general.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)
general.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展或类似 OpenClaw 的 Discord 中免费使用 claude-code（支持语音）

general.name: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
general.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
general.description_zh: FinceptTerminal 是一款现代金融应用，提供高级市场分析、投资研究和经济数据工具，专为交互式探索和数据驱动决策而设计，操作界面友好。

general.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
general.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
general.description_zh: Kronos：金融市场语言的基础模型

general.name: HKUDS/DeepTutor
general.description_zh: DeepTutor：智能体原生的个性化学习助手

general.name: mattpocock/skills
general.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
general.description_zh: 真正工程师的 Skills。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

general.name: google-ai-edge/gallery
general.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
general.description_zh: 一个展示端侧 ML/GenAI 用例的图库，让用户可以在本地试用各种模型。

general.name: coleam00/Archon
general.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.
general.description_zh: 首个面向 AI 编程的开源 harness 构建工具。让 AI 编程具备确定性和可重复性。

general.name: microsoft/markitdown
general.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
general.description_zh: 用于将文件和 office 文档转换为 Markdown 的 Python 工具。

general.name: lsdefine/GenericAgent
general.description: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption
general.description_zh: 自进化 agent：从 3.3K 行种子代码生长技能树，token 消耗减少 6 倍即可实现完整系统控制

general.name: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
general.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
general.description_zh: 免费打造惊艳演示。开源、无订阅、无水印，可免费商用。Screen Studio 的替代方案。

general.name: Z4nzu/hackingtool
general.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers

general.name: hugohe3/ppt-master
general.description: AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document — real PowerPoint shapes with native animations, not images · by Hugo He
general.description_zh: AI 从任意文档生成原生可编辑的 PPTX —— 真正的 PowerPoint 形状与原生动画，而非图片 · 作者 Hugo He

general.name: thedotmack/claude-mem
general.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
general.description_zh: 一款 Claude Code 插件，自动记录 Claude 在编码会话中的所有操作，使用 AI（基于 Claude 的 agent-sdk）进行压缩，并将相关上下文注入到后续会话中。

general.name: rtk-ai/rtk
general.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
general.description_zh: 通过代理常用开发命令将 LLM token 消耗降低 60-90% 的 CLI 工具。单一 Rust 二进制文件，零依赖

general.name: ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills
general.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
general.description_zh: 精选实用 Codex skills 列表，用于在 Codex CLI 和 API 之间自动化工作流。
